input.command:
kubectl -n elasticsearch get pods -o wide
echo "=== statefulsets ==="
kubectl -n elasticsearch get statefulset
echo "=== events (recent) ==="
kubectl -n elasticsearch get events --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -40

input.command:
kubectl -n elasticsearch get pods -o wide
echo "=== statefulset spec replicas ==="
kubectl -n elasticsearch get statefulset es-cluster -o jsonpath='{.spec.replicas}'
echo
echo "=== try health from within cluster ==="
kubectl -n elasticsearch exec curl-test -- curl -s -m 5 http://es-cluster:9200/_cluster/health?pretty
echo "=== es-http svc ==="
kubectl -n elasticsearch exec curl-test -- curl -s -m 5 http://es-http:9200/_cluster/health?pretty

description:
kubectl -n elasticsearch get pods -o wide
echo "=== statefulset spec replicas ==="
kubectl -n elasticsearch get statefulset es-cluster -o jsonpath='{.spec.replicas}'
echo

kubectl -n elasticsearch exec curl-test -- curl -s -m 5 http://es-cluster:9200/_cluster/health?pretty
echo "=== es-http svc ==="
kubectl -n elasticsearch exec curl-test -- curl -s -m 5 http://es-http:9200/_cluster/health?pretty

kubectl -n elasticsearch get pod es-cluster-0 -o jsonpath='{.status.containerStatuses[0].ready}{"\n"}'
kubectl -n elasticsearch exec curl-test -- curl -s -m 5 -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}\n" http://10.244.0.39:9200/
kubectl -n elasticsearch exec es-cluster-0 -- curl -s -m 5 http://localhost:9200/_cluster/health?pretty 2>&1
echo "=== date ==="
date -u
kubectl -n elasticsearch logs es-cluster-0 --tail=5

content.text: Now let's run `elasticsearch-node unsafe-bootstrap` against the PVC via a one-off pod.

input.content:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: es-unsafe-bootstrap
  namespace: elasticsearch
  labels:
    app: es-maintenance
spec:
  restartPolicy: Never
  containers:
    - name: es-tool
      image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:7.17.9
      command: ["sh", "-c", "sleep 3600"]
      volumeMounts:
        - name: data
          mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/data
  volumes:
    - name: data
      persistentVolumeClaim:
        claimName: data-es-cluster-0

content.content: File created successfully at: /tmp/unsafe-bootstrap-pod.yaml (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

  namespace: elasticsearch

  elasticsearch.yml: |

    node.name: ${POD_NAME}
